abilities.description: Regenerate target creature. Draw a card. Spell mastery — If there are two or more instant and/or sorcery cards in your graveyard, also regenerate each other creature you control.

effect.description: Regenerate target creature. Draw a card. Spell mastery — If there are two or more instant and/or sorcery cards in your graveyard, also regenerate each other creature you control.
effect.name: Regenerate
